## Overview

Second release candidate for v0.2.14. RC1 validated the new macOS distribution
path (universal binary + DMG, [#133](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/133));
this RC2 verifies a small CI hardening change before stable ships.

If you are an end user, please download the stable v0.2.14 release once it
ships. This RC is for distribution-pipeline verification.

## What changed since v0.2.14-rc1

### CI: force Node.js 24 for JavaScript actions

GitHub deprecated Node.js 20 on Actions runners and will remove it on
2026-09-16. `actions/checkout@v4` and `softprops/action-gh-release@v2` still
ship Node.js 20 bundles. RC1 surfaced the deprecation warning during the
release run.

This RC sets `FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true` at the workflow `env:`
level so both jobs run those actions on Node.js 24 ahead of GitHub's
2026-06-02 default switch. No behavioral change for end users; the build
output is identical to RC1 in every other respect.

## Carry-over from v0.2.14-rc1

The following land in v0.2.14 stable as well — see RC1 notes for details.

- Quit confirmation dialog ([#116](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/116))
- Tab bar horizontal scroll + arrow / new-tab buttons ([#117](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/117))
- macOS distribution: universal binary + DMG ([#133](https://github.com/ensky0/tildaz/issues/133))

## Verification

- [x] RC1 validated the universal DMG flow on `macos-15` runner
      (3m50s Windows, 2m7s macOS).
- [ ] RC2 validates that the Node 24 force does not regress the same flow.
